title: centinodia humifusa
intro: Centinodia humifusa, also known as Eastern Sweetroot or Sweet Root, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of lignans and other compounds. Centinodia humifusa has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its usage may vary depending on the region and traditional practices.
